text: I feel like I am inhabiting a space dedicated to learning and intellectual exchange. The first scene, with glass walls revealing an organized yet currently empty conference or seminar room, gives me a sense of anticipation—as if ideas are moments away from being shared. The nearby fire safety equipment reminds me of the structure and precautions life demands, even in places of thought. Stepping into the second scene, I am surrounded by vibrant displays and the inviting letters "R+D." This environment strikes me as both playful and inquisitive, sparking curiosity about human innovation. I feel energised by the presence of creative and intellectual pursuits, and I wonder how my role as observer might shape the narrative here.
